title: ABC World News: Iran closed Strait of Hormuz over Israel's attacks on Lebanon after Trump ceasefire announcement
snippet: Less than a day after Pres. Trump announced a ceasefire, Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz over Israel's ongoing attacks on Lebanon. White House demanding it be reopened, Trump insisting Lebanon not included.

title: WatcherGuru: Oil executives pressure Trump admin to reject Iran tolls in Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Oil executives pressure Trump admin to reject any deal allowing Iran to charge tolls in Strait of Hormuz. We did not have to do that before. We thought we won the war. 450 replies, 939 RTs.

title: WatcherGuru: No oil or gas tankers have passed through Strait of Hormuz since ceasefire announced
snippet: No oil or gas tankers have passed through Strait of Hormuz since ceasefire was announced, only 4 vessels carrying dry cargo. 196 replies, 396 RTs, 2815 likes.

title: Kobeissi Letter: US services sector signaling stagflation ISM PMI fell to 54.0 employment index 45.2

title: Royal Intel: Russian diplomat says conditions will not be accepted Trump trying to open Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Russian diplomat: These conditions will not be accepted. Trump is simply trying to open Strait of Hormuz for a sufficient period while he assembles additional forces.
